name: lexnova-runtime-api
description: Lex Nova HQ Cloud Run runtime API for server-side model execution.

scripts.check: npm run check:core && npm run check:sources && npm run check:diligence && npm run check:scripts && npm run check:tests
scripts.check:core: node --check server.js && node --check src/env.js && node --check src/routes/diligenceStageRoutes.js
scripts.check:sources: node --check src/source-capture/sourceCapture.js && node --check src/source-discovery/sourceDiscoveryAnchorLinks.js && node --check src/source-discovery/sourceDiscoveryOrchestrator.js && node --check src/source-discovery/sourceDiscoverySearchPlan.js && node --check src/source-discovery/sourceDiscoveryCategorizer.js && node --check src/source-discovery/sourceDiscoveryStrategy.js
scripts.check:diligence: node --check src/diligence/stageConfigs.js && node --check src/diligence/stagePromptLoader.js && node --check src/diligence/stageSchemaValidator.js && node --check src/diligence/stageRunner.js && node --check src/diligence/adapters/sourceBundleAdapter.js && node --check src/diligence/evidenceJunction.js && node --check src/diligence/evidenceJunctionWorkItems.js && node --check src/diligence/evidenceJunctionAdjudication.js && node --check src/diligence/evidenceJunctionPipeline.js
scripts.check:scripts: node --check scripts/smoke-runtime.mjs && node --check scripts/e2e-stage2-evidence-refiner.mjs && node --check scripts/e2e-stage4-target-legal-v3.mjs && node --check scripts/audit-product-source-discovery.mjs
scripts.check:tests: node --check src/diligence/adapters/sourceBundleAdapter.v2.test.mjs && node --check src/diligence/evidenceJunction.test.mjs && node src/diligence/adapters/sourceBundleAdapter.v2.test.mjs && node src/diligence/evidenceJunction.test.mjs
